title: Acuite Ratings is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Acuite Ratings is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Acuite Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Acuite Ratings:
Acuite Ratings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
